name: mre-cockpit-harness
description: The cockpit screenshot harness (docs/07 Phase 3, CU5) — promoted from the frontend bake-off spike. Playwright drives the read-only cockpit through scripted states, captures screenshots, and asserts machine-checked numbers incl. the standing C1 label-vs-bar drift regression. Builds + serves src/cockpit via the hermetic fixture server. CI runs it headless.
